learnings: Lower-bound edge split: edge_lcb<0 trades netted $+1.81 (10 trades) vs edge_lcb>=0 at $-16.41 (19 trades).
NO side: 15/29 won, net $-14.60 this window.
Profile split: live 3/6 won ($-0.96); research 12/23 won ($-13.64). Judge each gate set on its own book; research-profile losses are expected data-collection cost.
Most frequent gate rejections: source spread (6516x); edge (5536x).
Clean next-day forecast error averaged 2.53F across 7 settled day(s) in this window.
recommended_changes: Window ROI is materially negative on a fair sample; audit the largest losers for a shared failure mode before the next change.
Mean absolute forecast error is 2.53F; review source weights and recent Google/NWS disagreement before trusting tail bins.
